{{Quote|Rezunin Starwing, one of the Naboo Pirate bosses is in the area.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SWI" />}}
'''Rezunin Starwing''' led a [[Naboo pirates|group]] of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] who operated in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Good work with Rezunin. He was a thorn in our side.|Captain Typho, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:SWI" />}}
Some time after [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the [[Naboo Royal Space Fighter Corps/Legends|Naboo Planetary Defense]], led by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gregar Typho/Legends|Typho]], [[Dogfight over Naboo|defeated]] a group of Starwing's pirates.<ref name="SWG:PfT">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Legacy Quest: "Patrolling for Typho" in the Naboo system</ref> Soonafter, Starwing arrived with an escort of three [[M3-A Scyk interceptor/Legends|M3-A Scyk fighters]], but was himself defeated by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]].<ref name="SWG:SWI" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rezunin Starwing appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:SWI" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Rezunin Starwing was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:Legacy Quest|Legacy Quest]]" with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]", a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
